config.html:
Scaffold từ DQHF — form gốc: frmNhapTienDoHangTrang
Nút WinForms gốc: Thêm · Đóng · Lưu
Nút cần gắn thêm: Xoá (procedure/records.delete) · In (cần print template entity) · Xuất (export)
Proc cần port: TRTB_M_LOCATION_PROCESS_GETALL, TRTB_M_OP_GET, TR_DONDATHANG_GETLISTHTR, TR_PALLET_CARD_GETALL3, TR_PALLET_CARD_GETBYID, TR_PALLET_GETBYID, TR_ROUT_UV_GET, TR_ROUT_UV_GETBYID, TR_TRANGTHAI_SANXUAT_GETBYPCARD, TR_TRANGTHAI_SANXUAT_INSERT
Entity phụ (lookup/filter cân nhắc thêm): tr_dexuat_bangmau, tr_dondathang, tr_hehang, tr_khachhang, tr_material, tr_order, tr_order_replacement, tr_pallet, tr_pallet_card, tr_phieuyeucau, tr_phieuyeucau_chitiet, tr_phieuyeucau_muahang, tr_phieuyeucau_muahang_chitiet, tr_site, trtb_m_location, trtb_m_op
